name: demand-radar
description: Validate whether a demand is real before you build it. Frame a falsifiable hypothesis, fan out parallel agents across two pillars (top-down: industry reports / market size / capital signals; bottom-up: Hacker News / App Store reviews / search & social), enforce a 7-axis demand scorecard with ≥2-source triangulation, run an adversarial red-team that tries to kill the idea, and ship an answer-first HTML report with a Go / Conditional / Pivot / No-go verdict. Zero login, no scrapers — official free APIs + web search only. Trigger with /demand.
